Package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert.handlers

Class CommonCopierHandler

java.lang.Object
space.sunqian.fs.object.convert.handlers.CommonCopierHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ObjectCopier.Handler
public class CommonCopierHandler extends Object implements ObjectCopier.Handler
The common implementation of ObjectCopier.Handler, also be the default last handler of ObjectCopier.defaultCopier(). Using getInstance() can get a same one instance of this handler.

This handler uses the default implementations of ObjectCopier.Handler, which directly copies properties from the source object to the target object, following the rules of the specified options defined in ConvertOption.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull CommonCopierHandler getInstance()
      Returns a same one instance of this handler.

    • copyProperty

      public boolean copyProperty(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object srcKey, @Nullable @Nullable Object srcValue, @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> src, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: ObjectCopier.Handler
      This method will be invoked when copy an entry from the source map to a destination map. Returns false to prevent subsequent handlers to continue to copy, otherwise returns true to continue to copy.
      Specified by:
      copyProperty in interface ObjectCopier.Handler
      Parameters:
      srcKey - the key of the entry to be copied
      srcValue - the value of the entry to be copied
      srcSchema - the schema of the source map
      dst - the destination map
      dstSchema - the schema of the destination map
      converter - the converter used in the mapping process
      options - the options used in the mapping process
      Returns:
      whether to continue to copy
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception can be thrown here

    • copyProperty
